name: Green Snow (Green Tea Syrup & Sweet Beans on Ice)
recipeInstructions:
For the Green Tea Syrup:
1/2 cup Sugar
4 tsp Instant green tea (or 2 tsp Matcha)
Shaved ice
Combine sugar, water, and green tea in a small pot. Heat until boiling.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 3-4 minutes.
Cool mixture, then stir in green tea powder. Adjust flavor as desired.
Prepare sweetened adzuki beans:
1/4 cup Adzuki beans
5 tbsp Sugar
Bring beans and water to boil in a small pot. Cook covered for 2 minutes on low heat.
Let sit, still covered, for 1 hour.
Return to boil briefly, then simmer covered for another 30 minutes.
Add sugar and cook uncovered until thickened, about 10-12 minutes.
Drain cooled beans.
Assemble:
Pile shaved ice in bowls. Pour syrup over the ice. Scatter beans on top.
